name: Farsamooyinka Dhaqdhaqaaqa Bukaanka
time_estimate: 1-30 min iyadoo ku xiran masaafada iyo habka
description: U rarida dhaawaca dabka hoostiisa ama meel nabdoon si loogu daweeyo. Habkani wuxuu ku xiran yahay dhulka, fogaanta, tirada samatabbixiyeyaasha, iyo dhaawacyada dhaawaca. Taxadirka xawaaraha iyo laf dhabarta waa go'aan xeeladeed -- TCCC, khatartu waxay qaadataa mudnaanta.
equipment: Qashinka NATO / Sariiraha la qaadi karo
Qashinka la hagaajiyay: tiirarka + jaakadaha / ponchos
steps: DARYEELKA DABKA KU HOOS YAHAY: Soo celi dabka marka hore haddii aad hubaysan. Dhaqdhaqaaqa dhaawaca adigoo isticmaalaya habka ugu dhaqsaha badan ee jiidid -- ha u joogsan in lagu daweeyo aagga dilka.
DEJINTA DEGDEGGA AH (hal samatabbixiye): qabso kuleej/jiid garbaha, dhabarka u jiid. Ka ilaali madaxa saamaynta.
DABKA QAADASHADA (hal samatabbixiye): dhaawaca garbaha korkiisa masaafo dheer -- waxay u baahan tahay dhaawacu inuu miyir daboolmo ama la kaashado.
LABA QOF BAA: samatabbixiyeyaashu waxay isku xiraan gacmaha dhabarka iyo jilbaha dhaawaca. Ka dhaqsiyaha badan u jiidida masaafo gaaban.
QASHINKA LA HORMARAY: dhig laba tiir oo 18 inji u dhexeeya. Ku dheji jaakadaha tirarka leh badhamada gudaha. Tijaabi ka hor inta aanad shubin dhaawaca.
QASHIN QABSIGA AH: is-rog-rog, hoos gal dhaawacyada, duub oo ku xafid xarkaha. Waxay u baahan tahay 2-4 sideyaal.
Marka la raraynayo: kor u qaad tirinta 3, ilaali isku toosinta madaxa/jirka, yaree dhaqdhaqaaqa laf dhabarta marka ay suurtagal tahay.
Haddii dhaawaca laf-dhabarta laga shakiyo oo aan khatar ahayn: sii wad xasilinta khadka inta dhaqdhaqaaqa oo dhan. Hal qof oo u heellan xakamaynta madaxa.
U dhaqaaq daboolka, ka dibna dib u qiimee ABC.
warnings: Mudnaanta TCCC: nolosha> addimada> taxadarka laf dhabarta. Ha dib u dhigin dhaqdhaqaaqa aagga dilaaga ah ee taxaddarrada laf dhabarta.
Qaadashada dabdemiska waa ka hortag looga shakisan yahay dhaawaca laf dhabarta, jabka femur, ama dhaawaca caloosha oo gala.
Qashin-qubka oo la hagaajiyay: tijaabi awoodda miisaanka ka hor intaadan ku kalsoonayn qof dhaawac ah.
U guurista dhibbanaha dalxiiska: hubi dalxiiska ma dabcin inta lagu jiro dhaqdhaqaaqa.

pediatric.note: Carruurtu way ka fudud yihiin -- samatabbixiye keliya ayaa qaada muddo dheer. Ilaali madaxa qiyaas ahaan ka weyn -- xarunta sare ee cufisjiidka marka aad qaadid.

obstetric.note: Ka fogow meelaynta u nugul ama cadaadiska caloosha. Xagga dambe (dhinaca bidix ee la door bidaayo) ama gaadiidka dhabarka oo leh miskaha bidix.
